mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.doctor_id, s.dept_id, s.work_date, s.work_time, s.total_number, s.schedule_status, s.create_time, s.update_time, d.doctor_name, d.title, d.specialty, d.avatar, dept.dept_name, dept.dept_desc, ns.id as source_id, ns.remain_number, ns.source_status, ns.version FROM hos_schedule s LEFT JOIN hos_doctor d ON s.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN hos_department dept ON s.dept_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN hos_number_source ns ON s.id = ns.schedule_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0
